controls.title: Logical access controls are evaluated from identity and authorization evidence
controls.evidence_requirement: Current identity, access review, privileged access, or authorization policy evidence exists and has no open high-risk failure.

controls.title: Security monitoring controls are evaluated from runtime, audit, and detection evidence
controls.evidence_requirement: Current monitoring, runtime policy, audit, or alert evidence exists and unresolved high-risk monitoring failures are tracked.

controls.title: AI system context and dependencies are represented in inventory evidence
controls.evidence_requirement: Model, agent, cloud, dependency, or AI system inventory evidence exists for production AI systems.

controls.title: AI risk indicators are measured from runtime and detection evidence
controls.evidence_requirement: Runtime policy, AI detection, or AI risk telemetry exists and unresolved high-risk events are tracked.

controls.title: AI legal and regulatory requirements are documented
controls.evidence_requirement: AI governance evidence identifies applicable legal and regulatory requirements for production AI systems.

controls.title: AI systems are inventoried according to risk priorities
controls.evidence_requirement: AI system inventory evidence exists for production agents, models, datasets, and tool integrations.

controls.title: AI system behavior is monitored in production
controls.evidence_requirement: Runtime, prompt, inference, MCP-call, or model-monitoring evidence exists for production AI systems.

controls.title: AI incidents and errors are tracked and communicated
controls.evidence_requirement: AI incident, error, or detection evidence exists and unresolved high-severity AI failures are tracked.

controls.title: Access control policy is enforced from identity and authorization evidence
controls.evidence_requirement: Identity, access review, or authorization policy evidence exists for in-scope systems and has no unresolved high-risk failure.

controls.title: Monitoring activities produce continuous detection evidence
controls.evidence_requirement: Continuous monitoring, SIEM, runtime, or audit evidence exists for in-scope systems and unresolved high-severity events are tracked.

controls.title: ICT readiness for business continuity is exercised and evidenced
controls.evidence_requirement: Backup, restore, or disaster-recovery test evidence exists within freshness SLA.

controls.title: Information access management restricts PHI access to authorized roles
controls.evidence_requirement: Identity and access review evidence exists for PHI-scoped systems and unresolved high-risk findings are tracked.

controls.title: Audit controls record activity on systems containing PHI
controls.evidence_requirement: Audit log evidence exists for PHI-scoped systems with retention satisfying the connector freshness SLA.

controls.title: Transmission security protects PHI in transit
controls.evidence_requirement: Network policy or runtime evidence confirms PHI transit is encrypted and egress controls block unencrypted destinations.

controls.title: Risk analysis is performed for systems handling electronic PHI
controls.evidence_requirement: Risk-analysis evidence exists for electronic-PHI-scoped systems and is current within the assessment freshness SLA.

controls.title: Risk management actions reduce identified ePHI risks
controls.evidence_requirement: Risk-treatment or remediation evidence exists for identified ePHI risks, with unresolved high-risk failures tracked.

controls.title: Encryption and decryption controls protect electronic PHI at rest
controls.evidence_requirement: Encryption configuration or data-protection evidence exists for electronic-PHI-scoped systems with no unresolved high-risk failure.

controls.title: Access to cardholder data is restricted by business need to know
controls.evidence_requirement: Identity and access review evidence exists for cardholder-data-scoped systems and unresolved findings are tracked.

controls.title: All access to cardholder data is logged and monitored
controls.evidence_requirement: Audit, SIEM, or runtime evidence covers cardholder data systems with no stale or missing source.

controls.title: Security of systems and networks is regularly tested
controls.evidence_requirement: Scanner, penetration-test, or vulnerability evidence exists with no open critical findings past the freshness SLA.

controls.title: Security of processing — appropriate technical and organisational measures
controls.evidence_requirement: Encryption, access control, and incident-monitoring evidence exists for personal-data systems with no unresolved high-risk failure.

controls.title: Records of processing activities are maintained and current
controls.evidence_requirement: Processing-activity records evidence exists within freshness SLA and covers every in-scope system.

controls.title: Personal-data breach notification within 72 hours
controls.evidence_requirement: Incident-response runbook + breach-notification evidence exists; unresolved high-severity incidents have notification timers tracked.

controls.title: Data protection by design and by default is evidenced
controls.evidence_requirement: Privacy-design, minimization, or default-configuration evidence exists for personal-data systems within freshness SLA.

controls.title: Processor relationships are governed and evidenced
controls.evidence_requirement: Processor inventory, agreement, or vendor-review evidence exists for personal-data processors within freshness SLA.

controls.title: Data protection impact assessments are maintained for high-risk processing
controls.evidence_requirement: DPIA evidence exists for high-risk processing systems and unresolved high-risk findings are tracked.

controls.title: Risk management system for high-risk AI is established and maintained
controls.evidence_requirement: AI risk-management evidence exists for high-risk AI systems and unresolved high-severity risks are tracked.

controls.title: Data governance — training, validation, and testing datasets are appropriate
controls.evidence_requirement: Model lineage, dataset provenance, and PII-scrub evidence exists for high-risk AI systems.

controls.title: Automatic record-keeping (logs) over the lifetime of high-risk AI systems
controls.evidence_requirement: Runtime inference, prompt, or MCP-call evidence exists for high-risk AI systems with retention satisfying the connector freshness SLA.

controls.title: High-risk AI transparency information is available to deployers
controls.evidence_requirement: AI system instructions, limitations, intended-use, or transparency evidence exists for high-risk AI systems.

controls.title: Human oversight measures are defined and evidenced
controls.evidence_requirement: Human-oversight, escalation, or operator-review evidence exists for high-risk AI systems within freshness SLA.

controls.title: Accuracy, robustness, and cybersecurity are tested for high-risk AI
controls.evidence_requirement: Model evaluation, robustness, cybersecurity, or runtime-monitoring evidence exists for high-risk AI systems and unresolved high-risk failures are tracked.

controls.title: AI system risk treatment is planned and tracked
controls.evidence_requirement: AI risk-treatment plan evidence exists with assignees and target dates for every open high-risk item.

controls.title: Operational AI controls produce continuous evidence
controls.evidence_requirement: Runtime, monitoring, and incident evidence exists for operational AI systems with no unresolved high-risk failure.
